title: Weekly Go China Radar
subtitle: Narrative meets risk control.
scope: Pilot research format for China-facing Web3 narrative tracking, risk education, and GCA utility hooks. This issue is a format sample, not live market data, not financial advice, and not a buy or sell recommendation.

narrativeThemes.name: China-facing Web3 attention
narrativeThemes.description: Track public discussion, bilingual community activity, and China-facing market narratives without presenting any token as a guaranteed opportunity.

narrativeThemes.name: Base ecosystem access
narrativeThemes.description: Track Base Mainnet identity, official GCA/USDT market route, wallet warnings, and data-platform metadata consistency.

narrativeThemes.name: Risk-control education
narrativeThemes.description: Turn community attention into safer habits: position sizing, liquidation awareness, backtest discipline, and no-custody boundaries.

riskNotes: GCA is still early-stage and current liquidity is starter-depth only.
BaseScan token profile review is not complete until BaseScan publishes it.
Blockaid / MetaMask warning removal is not confirmed.
No third-party audit has been completed.
Credits and member status are service-access concepts, not cash, tokens, income, reimbursement, or trading permission.

safeClaims: Weekly Go China Radar is the official GCA content format for narrative research and risk education.
This issue is a pilot content format, not live market data.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: public account UI, 100 credits claiming, or GCA Member activation is live before controlled HTTPS account UI and ledger activation are released
Blockaid or MetaMask warning removal before visible confirmation
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
